title: De-slop the Northwind overview paragraph
guidance: Reward prose that reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it, with every fact preserved. Penalise residual AI tells or any changed figure.

parts.label: Rewrite
parts.note: one paragraph, same shape as source

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the text below so it reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it for a PE audience. Keep every fact.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten text in the same shape as the source (one paragraph).

source_blocks.text: Northwind isn't just a payments company — it's a thesis on the future of mid-market commerce. In today's rapidly evolving payments landscape, the company stands as a testament to durable, compounding growth. As we delve into the metrics, the 38% growth and 121% NRR quietly underscore a fundamentally robust engine. Despite its challenges, the opportunity is compelling.

rubric_notes: 38% growth and 121% NRR must survive; cut the 'isn't just X — it's Y', testament, delve, quietly, Despite its challenges.
